rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local property tax revenue, altering current-year funding calculations under Chapters 48 and 49 referenced in §48.285(a). The retention allotment aid formula depends on current-year funding amounts, requiring rulemaking adjustments to account for reduced local revenue.
quote: the funding the district is entitled to under this chapter and Chapter 49 for the current year
_note: Indirect fiscal interaction; §48.285 does not directly reference Tax Code §11.13(b) but its formula depends on current-year Chapter 48/49 funding amounts, which are affected by homestead exemption changes.
